disable-trigger-enable-spam.name: Confirmed you have activated all Animation Triggers?
disable-trigger-enable-spam.hint: Enable this setting to disable that pop up
disable-trigger-enable-spam.message:
[Trigger Animation Trove (PF2e)] To have this module work as expected your must enable all trigger engine triggers in the Animations folder.

To get there go to Game Settings -> Trigger Engine -> Register Triggers -> Animations -> Click the folder Icon -> Enable all Triggers underneath that folder -> click the save button at the top.

This message will repeat on startup until you confirm you have completed this setup in this module's settings under Game Settings
